title: Reserialize normalizes a direct YAML edit (happy path)

steps.title: Prerequisites
steps.body: Unity project open, bridge running (`unity_open_mcp_ping` → `connected: true`), MCP client configured. Goal: confirm `unity_open_mcp_reserialize` rewrites a text-serialized asset through Unity's serializer after a direct YAML edit, and that the gate envelope reports a clean delta.

steps.title: Stage a non-canonical copy of a working prefab
Run reserialize in the MCP client (assets-only round-trip)
Expected outcomes
items: mutation.output contains reserialized: ["<fixture>/HappyPath.prefab"], totalCount: 1, wholeProject: false, includeMeta: false
file on disk is canonical Unity YAML (consistent 2-space indents, no trailing whitespace inside scalars, %YAML 1.1 header preserved, fileID lines untouched)
companion HappyPath.prefab.meta is unchanged (default round-trips asset YAML only)

reset.note: fs_copy tracks the companion .meta when the source companion exists; the afterStep fs_delete {fixtureRoot} reverts the whole staged tree. The fs_patch snapshot restore runs before the declared delete.
